entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The cultivated species Cicer arietinum L.

entities.name: C. RETICULATUM
entities.description: A wild annual Cicer species used for genetic improvement of chickpea.

entities.name: C. CHINOSPERMUM
entities.description: A wild annual Cicer species used for genetic improvement of chickpea.

entities.name: C. PINNATIFIDUM
entities.description: A wild annual Cicer species studied for interspecific hybridization.

entities.name: C. JUDAICUM
entities.description: A wild annual Cicer species studied for interspecific hybridization.

entities.name: C. BIJUGUM
entities.description: A wild annual Cicer species studied for interspecific hybridization.

entities.name: C. CHORASSANICUM

entities.name: C. CUNEATUM

entities.name: INTERSPECIFIC HYBRIDIZATION
entities.description: The process of crossing different species to create hybrids for gene transfer.

entities.name: GENE TRANSFER
entities.description: The movement of genetic material between different species.

entities.name: PRE-FERTILIZATION BARRIERS
entities.description: Biological obstacles that prevent fertilization from occurring.

entities.name: CYTOGENETIC STUDY
entities.description: The study of chromosomes and their relation to cell behavior in hybrids.

entities.name: KARYOTYPING
entities.description: The process of pairing and ordering all the chromosomes of an organism to investigate species relationships.

entities.name: ELECTRON MICROSCOPY OF POLLEN GRAINS
entities.description: High-resolution imaging used to characterize hybrids and investigate species relationships.

entities.name: POLLEN-PISTIL INTERACTION STUDIES
entities.description: Investigation of the interaction between pollen and the pistil to determine species relationships.

entities.name: GENETIC VARIABILITY
entities.description: The range of different genotypes present within the wild Cicer species.

entities.name: GENETIC IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing the genetic makeup of the cultivated chickpea.

entities.name: IN VITRO TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: Laboratory techniques used to overcome biological barriers to hybridization.

entities.name: POST-FERTILIZATION BARRIERS
entities.description: Biological obstacles that occur after fertilization, preventing successful hybridization.
